crime.value: Mass shooting at a high school
crime.quote: I ran at him, put the gun behind his neck, telling him to move it.

victim.value: Multiple students at Johnson County Private High School, including Alicia and others
victim.quote: People were running around like black spots on a broken TV screen. I grinned at the scene. Then, they went down. Bam. Bam. BAM!

closed_world.value: Johnson County Private High School for Boys and Girls - a small town school during lockdown
closed_world.quote: They were trapped, and where ever he was, Sumio in this whole crowd, he was trapped too.

culprit_and_motive.value: Guinevere, motivated by unrequited love for Sumio and bullying/mental illness
culprit_and_motive.quote: I was diagnosed with schizophrenia... when I didn't get enough love, from my parents, from any of my peers, from anyone.

resolution.value: Multiple alternative endings - suicide, new romantic beginning, or being shot by Sumio
resolution.quote: I put the gun on the floor and embraced my new start...

red_herring.value: Alicia presented as romantic rival/girlfriend, but Sumio claims no knowledge of her existence
red_herring.quote: Please don't kill me, but I've got no idea on who you're talking about…

clue_fairness.value: Psychiatric history and hunting incident revealed through protagonist's own recollection
clue_fairness.quote: I remember what happened on that unforgettable hunting trip. I had nearly shot my dad, on purpose.

social_world.value: Insular suburban community with social hierarchies between jocks and outcasts
social_world.quote: Where I live, people are nice and polite. Our daily lives are what a city person would call 'boring'

reveal_mechanic.value: Mental illness diagnosis (schizophrenia) explains distorted perceptions and motivations
reveal_mechanic.quote: The past, when I was diagnosed with schizophrenia.

investigator_wound.value: Protagonist's unrequited love and social isolation driving violent obsession
investigator_wound.quote: Where I sat. Where I fell in love. Unexpected.
